sources.title: The Forger 2012 Dvdrip
sources.description: A teenager wanders into Carmel, California, where he is soon introduced to the art-forgery community.

metadata.Plot: Joshua, a teenager with a drugged-out mother on the run, wanders into the affluent community of Carmel, California. After getting himself into trouble, the authorities try to track down his mother. But in the meantime, a successful artist/businessman offers to take in Joshua and let him have a chance at a good life. His motives are questionable considering his line of business and how he plans to use Joshua's artistic talents, but Joshua has met a girl and he's not sure if the money is worth selling off his morals.
metadata.Writer: Carlos De Los Rios, Lawrence Roeck, Frank Salcido
metadata.Actors: Lauren Bacall, Josh Hutcherson, Alfred Molina
